title: Elliptical Illusion
description:
The Official Elliptical Illusion Server modpack. 

Ever wanted to be a spider and climb walls and sling web? Or bathe in lava...
We use the origins mod so all of this is possible. And much more...
body:
The Official client-side modpack for Elliptical Illusion.

What is Elliptical Illusion?
  - Survival
  - Minecraft Ver. 1.20.1
  - Fabric Ver. 0.15.0

Why would I want to play on Elliptical Illusion?
  - [Waystones](https://modrinth.com/mod/fwaystones) for fast travel
  - Mob Griefing has been disabled 
  - [FLAN](https://modrinth.com/mod/flan) installed server-side (Grief Protection)
  - Everyone gets their own '[Origin](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins)' (Special Abilities)
  - [Travelers backpacks](https://modrinth.com/mod/travelersbackpack) (More bag space and even more special abilities) 
  - [Squaremap](http://themap.modded.fun:8080/) (Online map)[LIVE]

What's an Origin?
  - [Origins](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins) is a mod by Apace. "Choose an Origin and begin your game with special abilities, some of which help you out, while others hinder you in your gameplay. The different Origins all have a different impact on the vanilla gameplay. If you don't like these at all, you can also pick the "Human" origin while playing with friends on a server."

Can I fly?
  - Kinda... Check out the Elytrian Origin

What happens if my character dies?
  - You keep all of your experience and inventory.

I've tried to make the process as simple as possible and with the help of the Modrinth Launcher
getting started is as simple as installing a modpack and connecting to the server.
